name: mock-expensive-simulations
description: Diagnose and fix pytest tests hanging due to expensive Monte Carlo or bootstrap simulation calls. Covers: identifying the hanging function, verifying the correct patch target (caller vs origin namespace), and adding an autouse conftest fixture.
trigger_conditions: pytest hangs at a fixed percentage of the test suite
push hook blocks indefinitely due to test timeout
tests call compute_statistical_results or similar analysis functions
Monte Carlo / bootstrap functions with large n_simulations defaults
author: ProjectScylla session
